migrations.description: Base schema - 19 core tables, triggers, RLS, indexes
Accounting + notification tables (transactions, categories, cash register, reports, admin_notifications, notification_templates, customer_feedback)
Sub-sector taxonomy data (40+ sub-sectors for 4 main sectors)
Notification system enhancements: whatsapp_notification_enabled toggle, notification_log table, new template types
AI chatbot system: chat_sessions, chat_messages, chatbot_knowledge_base, chat_escalations tables with RLS policies and indexes
Automatic report system: report_settings JSONB on companies, report_send_log table
Panel system: PIN-based role login for staff (pin_code, panel_roles columns + panel_login RPC)
Coupon expansion (type, applicable_plans, max_uses, usage tracking) + referral codes + loyalty/sadakat system (settings, points, transactions) + company slug
Bugfix: customers.average_rating, companies.booking_* columns, appointments default status to beklemede
